title: nephrodium rufescens
intro: Nephrodium rufescens, also known as the rusty polypody or rufescens polypody, is a species of fern native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium rufescens include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
